entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 11:24
entries.excerpt: Others seize what is not theirs, etc. He says, They will always be in poverty, not only in torments, where they receive not even a drop of water to be refreshed for a short while (Luke XVI), but even in this life, where although they seize innumerable things, the greedy are always in need.

entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 11:24
entries.excerpt: Others divide their own, etc. Because they receive a hundredfold in this time, and in the future age, eternal life (Matt. XIX).
